hero.lead: Create interactive GPS adventures, outdoor quizzes and treasure hunts in just a few minutes. Boost student engagement through gamification and field-based learning.
rotating: Field learning on a new level
hero.socialProof: Built by Macedonian educators for field-based teaching

phone.riddleText: In which year was the Clock Tower in Prilep built? Enter the correct answer to unlock the next clue.

how.title: Three steps to an adventure
how.subtitle: No complicated software — from idea to a field game in minutes.

steps.title: Map
steps.text: Place points on the GPS map across the city or the school yard.

steps.title: Challenge
steps.text: Add riddles, questions or tasks to be solved on location.

steps.title: Activate
steps.text: Share a code or QR with students and watch them explore in real time.

items.title: For teachers
items.text: Increase engagement in history, biology or geography classes through field learning and gamification.

items.title: For parents
items.text: Organize unique birthdays and family walks that take kids away from screens and out into the world.

items.title: For municipalities & museums
items.text: Digitize tourist tours and make local landmarks interactive and unforgettable.

testimonials.title: What educators say
testimonials.subtitle: Experiences from teachers and guides who have already tried Авантура in the field.

items.quote: For the first time my students were truly excited about a history class. They ran from point to point to solve the next riddle!
items.name: Marija S.

items.quote: In half an hour I made a math hunt across the school yard. The kids didn't even realize they were actually solving problems.
items.name: Elena P.

items.quote: We used it for a tour through the old part of town. The QR codes on the landmarks left a great impression on visitors.
items.name: Toni K.

items.q: Is a constant internet connection required?
items.a: No. Авантура has an offline mode — the player can download the adventure while on Wi-Fi, and then the GPS and riddles work without internet. Answers sync automatically once the connection returns.

items.q: Does it work on iPhone and Android?
items.a: Yes. Авантура runs in the browser on any modern phone (iPhone and Android), and is also available as an installable Android app.
Yes, you can start for free and create an adventure without paying. For larger groups and advanced features we have paid plans.

items.q: Does the student have to install an app?
items.a: No. It's enough to open the link or scan a QR code to start playing directly in the browser.

items.q: Can I use QR codes instead of GPS?
items.a: Yes. For indoor spaces such as museums and schools, points can be unlocked by scanning a QR code instead of by GPS location.
